title: 为何职业道德重要 / Why Ethics Matter
summary: 信息不对称大、客户高度信任,道德维护公众信心、保护客户利益,且高于"仅合规"。 / Given information asymmetry and the trust clients place in advisers, ethics protects public confidence and clients’ interests — and goes beyond mere compliance.

sections.heading: 为何重要
sections.body: 客户依赖顾问做重大财务决定;不当行为损害客户、声誉与行业信任。道德是维系信任的根本。

sections.heading: Why it matters
sections.body: Clients rely on advisers for major decisions; misconduct harms clients, reputation and trust. Ethics underpins that trust.

sections.heading: 道德 vs 合规
sections.body: 合规是法律最低线;道德要求在法律之外仍以客户利益为重、给出公平适当的结果。合法未必合德。

sections.heading: Ethics vs compliance
sections.body: Compliance is the legal minimum; ethics requires acting in the client’s interest and delivering fair, suitable outcomes beyond the law. Lawful is not always ethical.

keyPoints: 以客户利益为重、公平对待 / Put the client’s interest first; deal fairly
道德高于最低合规 / Ethics is higher than minimum compliance
合法未必合德 / Lawful ≠ ethical
sourceRef: CMFAS M5 — Ethics (Why Professional Ethics Matter)
